care.summary: Classic variegated spider plant with a broad creamy-white center stripe and arching leaves that produce hanging plantlets.
care.light: Bright indirect; tolerates medium light. Variegation holds best in good light.
care.water: Water when top inch of soil is dry; avoid overwatering and soggy crown
care.humidity: Average to moderate; tolerates dry air but benefits from occasional misting
care.fertilizer: Monthly dilute balanced feed in spring and summer
care.toxicity: Non-toxic to cats and dogs (generally considered pet-safe)
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from fluoride, salts, or dry air
Loss of variegation in low light
Root bound pots reduce plantlet production
tips: Use distilled or rainwater to prevent brown tips
Propagate plantlets in water or moist soil
Ideal in hanging baskets to show off cascading pups
